overview: Global Institute of Engineering and Technology (GIET), established in 2006, is a premier autonomous institution located in Moinabad, near Hyderabad. Managed by the Madina Education and Welfare Society (MEWS), the college is dedicated to providing high-quality technical education with a focus on holistic development. It was granted Autonomous status by the UGC and is known for its multi-cultural campus environment, strong emphasis on ethical values, and proactive training programs that bridge the gap between academia and the global industry.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC. Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH). ISO 9001:2015 Certified.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TG EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + TG ICET rank
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TG PGECET score

placements.internationalOffers: Occasional (Middle East and SE Asia via alumni network)

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via TGCHE state-level counseling based on TG EAPCET ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on institutional merit. Admission follows the rules of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education. Counseling Code: GLOB.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Results: Mid-May 2026; TG ICET 2026: May 13–14, 2026; Counseling: July 2026.

facilities: Specialized Centers for AI/ML and Robotics
Separate Residential Facilities for Boys and Girls
Transport (Fleet of buses covering all major suburbs of Hyderabad)
campus.specialNote: GIET is uniquely known for its 'Global Technical Fest' and annual industrial tours. The college emphasizes soft skills and personality development through its dedicated 'Training & Placement Cell' starting from the second year of B.Tech. Its location in Moinabad provides a serene, pollution-free learning environment while remaining close to Hyderabad's tech corridor.

contact.address: Chilkur(V), Moinabad(M), RR District, Hyderabad, Telangana - 501504
